productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Zip Black Wallet
description: wallets were a fashion statement before, now wallets for women are a must for any occasion. Update your individual style with this stylish wallet from lino perros. Dimensions : 19 cm X 10 cm Made of synthetic material for durability Has one main zippered compartment and one inner zippered compartment Two slip pockets and eight credit card slots on either sides One compartment on the front with a magnetic buttoned closure that has ten card slots and three slip pockets for additional space Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
